description:
Refactor the 'Bradford Protein Assay (Draft)' protocol in the Team Protocols repository by replacing the 'Full Procedure' step with four sequential steps as follows:

Step 1: 'Reagent Preparation'
Text: "Prepare BSA protein standards ranging from 0 to 2000 ug/mL using the same buffer as the unknown samples. WARNING: Coomassie dye is highly acidic and stains skin and clothing; wear gloves and a lab coat." (The warning sentence must be bolded).

Step 2: 'Sample Preparation'
Text: "Dilute unknown protein samples 1:10 and 1:100 in buffer to ensure they fall within the linear range of the standard curve."
